labor.s: 2 OSHA severe-injury reports in past 2y (0 amputations); 8 since 2015.

health.s: 3 CPSC recalls on record; sample hazard: the batteries in the remote controls can overheat.

topHazards.label: The batteries in the remote controls can overheat, posing a burn hazard to consumers.
The plastic wheels on the truck can detach, exposing a metal axle. This poses a puncture hazard to young children.

sampleRecalls.title: LEGO Systems Announces Recall of Remote Controls Due to Burn Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Power Functions IR Speed remote controls sold separately and as a part of the Emerald Night Train kit (Item K10194) and Power Functions kit (Item K8882). The gray plastic remote controls have two large orange dials and the word LEGO printed on the front.
hazards: The batteries in the remote controls can overheat, posing a burn hazard to consumers.
injuries: LEGO Systems Inc. has received four reports of batteries overheating. No injuries have been reported.

sampleRecalls.title: LEGO Recalls Toy Trucks Due to Puncture Hazard to Young Children
sampleRecalls.description: LEGO EXPLORE Super Truck is a toy-in-toy product designed for children ages 18 months and up. The toy features a red plastic pick-up/dump truck that measures about 15 inches high and 19 inches wide with four 7-inch black plastic wheels that are packed with a box of 40 LEGO DUPLO bricks in the cargo area. The unit has …
hazards: The plastic wheels on the truck can detach, exposing a metal axle. This poses a puncture hazard to young children.
injuries: LEGO Systems, Inc. has received 10 reports of a wheel detaching. Two children received serious puncture injuries, resulting from the exposed metal axle, once the wheel detached. Another child fell wh…

sampleRecalls.title: McDonald's and CPSC Announce Exchange for LEGO Building Set Toys Because of Choking Hazard
